case_title: BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT vs. GOODMAN, SANDRA

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SERVED FEB-12-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOODMAN, SANDRA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODMAN, SANDRA $2,789.78 RENT, $193.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,983.28
